name: html-ppt-agent-skill
description: Visual production work orders, versioned constrained browser editing, presenter mode, task-level regression, registered layouts, integrated source ingestion, project generation, themes, CJK typography, semantic visual QA, bundling, browser QA, PDF export, examples, and automated tests for the HTML PPT agent skill.

scripts.layouts:catalogs: node scripts/render-layout-catalog.mjs --theme swiss-grid --output qa/layout-catalogs/swiss-grid --force && node scripts/render-layout-catalog.mjs --theme editorial-ink --output qa/layout-catalogs/editorial-ink --force && node scripts/render-layout-catalog.mjs --theme technical-field --output qa/layout-catalogs/technical-field --force
scripts.layouts:qa: npm run layouts:catalogs && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs qa/layout-catalogs/swiss-grid/index.html --screenshots qa/layout-catalogs/swiss-grid/screenshots && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs qa/layout-catalogs/editorial-ink/index.html --screenshots qa/layout-catalogs/editorial-ink/screenshots && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs qa/layout-catalogs/technical-field/index.html --screenshots qa/layout-catalogs/technical-field/screenshots
scripts.test:core: node --test tests/structure.test.mjs tests/bundle.test.mjs tests/themes.test.mjs tests/layouts.test.mjs tests/visual-manifest.test.mjs tests/visual-work-orders.test.mjs tests/source-ingestion.test.mjs tests/source-integration.test.mjs tests/task-regression.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:browser
scripts.ci: npm run layouts:validate && npm run tasks:validate && npm run test && npm run tasks:run && npm run example:validate && npm run example:manifest && npm run example:visual-plan && npm run example:visual && npm run example:bundle && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs examples/ai-ad-workflow/dist/ai-ad-workflow.html
scripts.themes:validate: node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/swiss-grid/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/editorial-ink/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/technical-field/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/guizang-magazine/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/guizang-swiss/preview.html
scripts.themes:qa: node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/swiss-grid/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/swiss-grid && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/editorial-ink/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/editorial-ink && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/technical-field/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/technical-field && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/guizang-magazine/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/guizang-magazine && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/guizang-swiss/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/guizang-swiss
scripts.example:visual-plan: node scripts/build-visual-work-orders.mjs examples/ai-ad-workflow/deck.json --output examples/ai-ad-workflow/qa/visual-work-orders.json --markdown examples/ai-ad-workflow/qa/visual-work-orders.md --stage delivery --force && node scripts/validate-visual-work-orders.mjs examples/ai-ad-workflow/qa/visual-work-orders.json --deck examples/ai-ad-workflow/deck.json --stage delivery --strict
